title: Modern Mesa Pillow
description: Create a cozy sitting area filled with hand-stitched comfort. This easy knit pillow with an eye-catching geometric pattern is stitched one mitered square at a time using a technique of picking up stitches for minimal sewing in assembly. The soothing shades of Herrschners Worsted 8 yarn give your home a boost of tranquility. Looking for a bolder look? Switch up the colors for a look entirely your own!

title: Sunrise Stroll Tote
description: Accessorize in style with this textured two-toned tote! The sweet and simple design beautifully blends color and texture for a fun and functional way to carry your essentials on your sunny day adventures. The easy crochet tote pattern can be stitched in the bright and bold shades of Herrschners Cottage Cotton shown, or you can mix and match your favorite hues for a look that’s entirely your own.

title: Village Yarn Blue Burst Pot Holders
description: Brighten your kitchen with a splash of color! These pretty and practical pot holders pair solid and multi shades of Village Yarn Craft Cotton yarn to create a beautiful blend of color and texture that makes each petite project a work of hand-stitched art. Stitch the easy crochet pot holder pattern in the blue shades shown, or change up the colors to match your kitchen décor. The pair also makes a thoughtful housewarming gift!

title: Willow Yarns Garden Song Shawlette
description: Be ready for backyard garden parties with this lovely little shawlette. The easy knit design trimmed with a pattern of lacy diamonds pairs well with a sundress or a long-sleeve tee for a more casual look. Stitch it in the Wildflowers shade shown or pick another self-striping colorway of Willow Yarns Sylvan yarn for a look entirely your own.

title: English Garden Doily
description: No green thumb is needed to grow a garden of tiny blossoms to beautify your tabletop. This easy crochet doily pattern blends vintage lace with cheery flower appliqués for a tabletop garden that modernizes the vintage aesthetic for today’s modern stitchers. Stitch the doily in the shades of Herrschners Afghan Yarn shown, or switch up the flower color to match your décor.

title: Shamrock Glow Blanket
merged_info: F01726  St. Patrick's Day Blanket Crochet Easy
description: It’s your lucky day! This free easy crochet blanket pattern makes stitching fun and easy with self-striping yarn for fewer ends to weave in. Herrschners Worsted 8 Celebrate yarn makes color changes effortless as you crochet a field of shell stitches embellished with a hint of magical sparkle. Stitch it in the St. Patrick’s Day colorway shown, or pick any other shade from the Herrschners Worsted 8 line to make this dazzling design your own!

title: Tilework Bottle Carriers - Set of 2
merged_info: F01725  Fashion Accessories & Novelties Crochet Intermediate
description: Stay hydrated on the go with these cute and colorful bottle carriers! Made in two different colorways, this pair of easy crochet bottle carriers pair solid and multi shades of Herrschners Afghan Yarn for an eye-catching look in any colorway you choose. Constructed from square motifs, these fun and easy designs are designed to fit 16-20 oz bottles and feature a long carrying handle for hands-free carrying. Stitch the design in the vibrant colors shown, or try other colorways for a one-of-a-kind look.

title: Willow Yarns Muted Melody Cowl
description: Cozy up to colorwork with this exquisitely detailed design. The intermediate knit cowl uses a repeating slip stitch pattern worked two shades at a time to create the fanciful filigree pattern in a gradient of muted hues. Stitched in Willow Yarns Farmhouse Cotton yarn, the light weight cowl is perfect for spring days.

title: Willow Yarns Lovey Dovey Dishcloths
description: Add an extra dash of love to the heart of your home! This lovely and lacy set of heart-shaped dishcloths re-creates the look of vintage valentines in modern shades of Willow Meadow yarn for a fresh take on the doily aesthetic. The mix of solid and striped motifs in this intermediate crochet pattern makes a set of six unique designs while keeping the set coordinated as a lovely gift for Valentine’s Day, a bridal shower, or a housewarming party.

title: Soho Sugar Sky Earflap Hat
description: Keep cozy and colorful on cold-weather days. This easy crochet earflap hat enlivens your winter wardrobe with the bright and bold colorways of Soho Lively Bold yarn. This self-striping light weight yarn makes this easy crochet hat pattern even easier, as they stripes appear effortlessly as you stitch—with only a few ends to weave in! Top it off with a fun faux fur pom-pom for a playful finish.

title: Stitch & Switch Tote
description: Be tote-ally on trend with this granny square bag. The quick and easy crochet pattern made from two large granny square motifs is stitched in bright and bold shades of Herrschners Supreme Worsted yarn for a fabulously fun way to carry your essentials. Stitch it in the pretty-in-pink colorway shown, or mix it up with your favorite colors for a look entirely your own.

title: Fin-tastic Purse
description: Swim around town with a fishy friend to carry your essentials. This adorable amigurumi-inspired purse shaped like a fish makes a fashion accessory fabulously fun for any beach lover or wanna-be mermaid. The intermediate crochet design stitched pairs Herrschners Cheerful DK yarn with the self-striping Herrschners Sweet Swirls yarn to create rainbow scales and fins without having to change colors with every row.

title: Soho Sunset Serenade Set
description: Keep cozy and colorful on cold-weather days with coordinating set. This free easy knit hat and scarf pattern stitched in Soho Haze yarn uses simple slip stitch patterns to create a stair step geometric pattern that looks intricate but is easy enough for beginners. Stitch the pair in the icy blue and orange shades shown to brighten your look, or switch to shades to match your winter wardrobe.

title: Shadow Petals Shawl
description: This fabulously fun shawl is pretty in pink and oh-so chic! The bright and bold design crocheted in Herrschners Supreme Worsted yarn pairs vivid pink with dramatic black and light gray stripes that end in a playful looped edge. Carrying the yarn along the top edge greatly reduces the number of ends to weave in as you stitch this intermediate crochet shawl. Not a pink fan? Swap out that color with your favorite vibrant shade of Herrschners Supreme Worsted yarn for a look entirely your own.

title: Willow Yarns Gingham Wreath Towel
description: Stitch up some holiday spirit for the kitchen. This festive towel design pairs a berry-covered wreath with holiday gingham for a fun and functional holiday project. The easy crochet towel pattern stitched in Willow Yarns Meadow yarn is a thoughtful gift for the holiday hostess, but don’t forget to make one for yourself, too!

title: Department 71 Snowflake Scarf
description: Bundle up in a blizzard of sparkling snowflakes! Stitched in the shimmering Department 71 Holiday Lights yarn, this lacy snowflake scarf keeps you cozy and colorful with a dash of winter whimsy and a mighty metallic sparkle. The intermediate crochet scarf pattern is worked one snowflake motif at a time, then joined together before adding scalloped border for a fun and fabulous finish.

title: Frosted Fir Shawl
description: Sparkling stripes keep you warm with a hint of winter whimsy. This stunning shawl transforms a simple design into a chic statement piece by stitching the easy crochet pattern in Herrschners Worsted 8 Holiday Sparkle yarn. The self-striping yarn creates effortless color changes—without all those ends to weave in! Choose your favorite shimmering colorway to make this shawl your own.

title: Autumn Spice Beanie
description: Spice up your cold-weather wardrobe! Wonderfully soft and warm, this classic striped beanie stitched in autumnal tones of Herrschners Supreme Worsted yarn makes the perfect fall fashion accessory. Or, you can switch up the look by stitching the intermediate knit pattern in whimsical winter hues perfect for snowy days.

title: Frosty Fluffy Pillow
description: A winter wonderland has never been so cozy! This easy crochet pillow brings a flurry of fun to your sitting area with an oversized snowflake motif stitched using the corner-to-corner technique. The two-color pattern pairs white Herrschners Worsted 8 yarn with a dappled shade of Herrschners Worsted 8 Specks to brighten winter blues with a cheerful pop of color.

title: Granny Gems Hooded Scarf
description: Wrap up on cold-weather days in a warm hug from granny! This easy crochet hooded scarf is cleverly constructed from granny squares for an on-trend way to stay cozy when the temperature drops. You can stitch the simple granny square pattern in the bejeweled shades shown, or try any other shades from the Herrschners worsted 8 line to create a look entirely your own!

title: Premier Copper Kettle Vest
description: Layer up in hand-stitched comfort with this casual chic vest. The intermediate crochet design is worked in two halves from the center back out using a textured waffle stitch pattern that brings dimension to the finished vest. Stitched in a shimmering gradient shade of Premier Anti-Pilling Everyday Worsted yarn, this simple design with a hint of glitz will be your new go-to for home or the office.

title: Monarch Ripple Wrap
description: Wrap up in the colors of fall! This gorgeous easy crochet wrap keeps you cozy on a chilly fall day with broad ripples that add a pop of color to your outfit. Stitched in Stitched in three autumnal shades of Herrschners Cottage Cotton yarn, the easy crochet pattern modernizes the classic ripple look with broad bands of color finished with long fringe for on-trend style.

title: Soho Lunara Cowl
description: Layer up in luxury! Stitched in supremely soft Soho Skwishy yarn, this intermediate crochet cowl stitches up quickly with rows of puff stitches for a bright and bold way to keep cozy on cold-weather days. Stitch it in the regal shade of blue shown, or pick another color of Soho Skwishy for a look entirely your own.

title: Soho Little Legends Caps
description: Transform into fairytale creatures! Perfect for costumes or whimsical winter days, these soft and cozy caps stitched in Soho Skwishy yarn are designed with playful details like unicorn horns or dinosaur spikes that make bundling up fun. The intermediate crochet pattern includes instructions for both the unicorn and dinosaur designs. The finished caps measure 20" (51cm) circumference, perfectly sized to fit both kids and kids at heart.

title: Willow Yarns Diagonal Drift Scarf
description: Cold-weather fashion goes big and bold with this vibrant blanket scarf design. The intermediate crochet pattern stitched in Willow Yarns Freesia Cotton yarn pairs the self-striping yarn with elongated stitches to create mesmerizing color effects that zigzag across the crochet scarf for a fabulously fun look. Stitch the pattern in the colorway shown, or choose another self-striping colorway to create a look entirely your own!

title: Soho Pumpkin Spice Set
merged_info: F01695  Fall Home Décor Crochet Intermediate
description: Spice up your fall décor with a pile of hand-stitched pumpkins! This intermediate crochet pumpkin pattern is stitched in Soho Skwishy yarn, giving the finished pumpkins a velvety soft texture for a boutique look. The yarn requirements listed will make pumpkins in three different sizes using three different colors, creating a bountiful harvest of chic and stylish pumpkins perfect for a cozy fall aesthetic.

title: Soho Nutmeg Beanie
description: Spice up your cold-weather wardrobe! This easy crochet beanie stitched in Soho Skwishy yarn is a velvety soft way to keep cozy when the temperature drops. The pattern works up quickly in the bulky weight yarn, making it perfect for a last-minute gift or a quick way to change up your look this winter. Stitch it in the warm tones shown, or pick any colors of Soho Skwishy to make a look entirely your own.

title: Crispwood Cowl
description: Fair isle gets a fabulous fall makeover in this this colorwork cowl stitched in rich autumn hues. The intermediate knit cowl is stitched in fine weight Herrschners Afghan yarn, alternating bands of solid color with geometric patterns that keep stitching lively. As the design is worked in the round, all of the color floats stay hidden inside for a crisp and clean finished look.

title: Mermaid Magic Purse
description: Dive into a world of whimsy wherever you go with this mermaid inspired bag. Perfectly sized for carrying your essentials, this magical little purse features scale-like stitches to mimic the look of a mermaid tail. Stitch the intermediate crochet purse pattern in the dreamy colors shown, or choose a brighter colorway of Herrschners Sweet Swirls yarn for a bolder look.

title: Misty Morning Slippers
description: Step into coziness! Perfect for chilly nights or days that need a little extra pampering and self-care, these easy crochet slippers keep your toes toasty and colorful. The boot-like design comes in two sizes options for customized comfort easily adjusted to the foot and leg size that fits you best. Choose the shades of Herrschners Worsted 8 yarn shown, or switch up the look by choosing a different multi and coordinating solid.

title: Department 71 Dotted Darling Bag
description: Find the best of both worlds in this fabulously fun yet functional bag. The easy crochet bag is perfectly sized for carrying your essentials with a convenient shoulder strap tied up in an oversized bow that transforms a basic bag into a fashion statement. It is stitched in Department 71 Sassy Sprinkles yarn, creating confetti-like pops of color for a playful, party-ready look. Stitch it in the pretty pink shade shown, or pick another pastel to make this bag entirely your own!

title: Sundance Sunny Scribbles Pencil Pouch
description: Stitch up some storage perfect back-to-school season. Stitched in Sundance Sweets yarn, this easy knit pencil pouch is worked flat in three pieces, then seamed together before sewing in a zipper, making it a great project for all skill levels. The multi-purpose pouch is perfect for the classroom, office, or craft room and can be used for a variety of supplies from pencils and pens to markers and crayons to crochet hooks and crafting notions. It easily fits in a backpack, desk drawer, or project bag, and the zipper closure keeps supplies secure and organized on the go. Stitch it in the colorway shown, or pick another self-striping colorway for a look entirely your own.

title: Fernshade Cowl
description: Cozy has never looked so chic! This intermediate crochet cowl is stitched with a beautiful basketweave pattern that transforms simple stitches into a textured showpiece perfect for cold-weather days. The dappled look of Herrschners Worsted 8 Heathers adds depth to your stitches and gives the finished cowl a homespun appearance for a timeless fashion accessory. Stitch it in the neutral tone shown or pick a bold color to make a statement.

title: Soho Mod Steps Basket
description: Step up your storage! This eye-catching pattern with a bold geometric pattern stitched in Soho Skwishy yarn measure 15" across, making it perfect for storing plushies, toys, or other large projects. The intermediate crochet basket pattern uses elongated stitches to create the unique stair-step look with a subtle texture. You can easily adjust the height of the basket to boost the storage space, but keep in mind that will require an adjustment to the yarn and finishing materials used as an interior support and lining.

title: Department 71 Jolly Topper
description: Perfect for holiday selfies or festive family photos, this easy crochet Santa hat pattern includes sizes newborn through adult, making it easy to coordinate the whole family for Christmas card photos, social media posts, and holiday parties. The metallic shimmer of Department 71 Holiday Lights yarn adds a hint of glitz for a holiday look that sparkles and shines.

title: Chevron Cheer Stocking
description: Get ready for Santa’s visit with a hand-knit stocking! Stitched in cheerful shades of red and green, this playful stocking is a great way to welcome a new family member! The intermediate knit stocking pattern can be stitched in classic Christmas colors of Herrschners My Ami yarn as shown, or you can mix up the colors for a custom look for each family member!

title: Village Yarn Peppermint Scrubbies
description: The festive fun doesn’t stop when the Christmas party does! Keep the holiday spirit going when cleanup begins with playful peppermint scrubbies. Stitched in holiday hues of Village Yarn Craft Cotton yarn, these easy crochet scrubbies are stitched flat then seamed together to create the swirling stripes of a peppermint candy. The quick-to-stitch designs work up quickly as a last-minute gift for the holiday hostess.

title: Here Comes Santa Wall Hanging
description: Santa welcomes guests with a jolly wave in this playful wall hanging perfect for your entryway. The intermediate crochet design is worked in Tunisian crochet with merry and bright shades of Herrschners Worsted 3 yarn. Trimmed with peppermint tassels, this fun and festive design will be a joyful addition to your hand-stitched holiday décor.

title: Village Yarn Lemon Lagoon Towels
description: Bring zest to your kitchen clean-up routine with these lemon-fresh towels! The intermediate knit towel pattern is stitched in Village Yarn Craft Cotton yarn with scalloped waves that bring a splash of sunshine to your kitchen décor. Stitch the pair in the aqua and lemon shades shown, or switch the pattern up with other colors to match your kitchen. The set makes a great housewarming or hostess gift!

title: Granny's Colorblock Beach Bag
description: Get ready for fun in the sun with this bright and bold beach bag! The intermediate crochet design is created with a grid of four colorblock squares in summertime shades of Herrschners Worsted 8 yarn. Because the motifs are crocheted separately then sewn together, it makes a great take-along project for summer road trips!

title: Darling Daisy Bouquet
merged_info: F01680  Flowers & Gardens Home Décor Crochet Intermediate
description: Enjoy fresh flowers all season long with this hand-stitched bouquet that never loses its bloom! The intermediate crochet design features cheerful daisies surrounded by colorful blue and yellow flowers that can be easily customized to any shades of Herrschners My Ami yarn. Coordinate the vase color to match your décor for fabulous floral accent in any room of your home.

title: Village Yarn Zesty Netted Bag
description: Carry your goodies home from the farmers' market or haul your gear to the beach in a handy netted bag crocheted with Village Yarn Craft Cotton. This easy crochet bag works up quickly with a breathable netted design perfect for carrying produce or beach gear. The drawstring bag makes it easy to cinch the top closed to keep everything inside. Stitch it in the playful colorway shown, or choose another solid or multi shade for a look entirely your own.

title: Soho Spiral Snake
description: Stitch up a slithery pal who’s ready to snuggle! Measuring over 4 feet long, this cute and cuddly snake pal is ready to curl up for story time or an afternoon nap. The easy crochet pattern stitches up quickly in Soho Skwishy Spots yarn for a snuggly soft, multicolor pal for all ages! Stitch it in the blue hue shown, or mix it up with another colorway or even a solid shade of Soho Skwishy yarn for a look entirely your own!

title: Willow Yarns Calm & Cleanse Spa Set

description: Pamper yourself with an in-home spa experience! This set of coordinating spa accessories features a washcloth, facecloth, and soap sack designed with textured stitches perfect for scrubbing up in the shower! The intermediate knit designs make a great self-care gift for a friend—or even yourself! Stitch them in the cheerful coral shade of Willow Yarns Meadow yarn shown, or switch up the color to coordinate with your bath décor.

title: Soho Plum Snuggles Baby Blanket
description: Snuggle up to softness! This easy crochet baby blanket pattern stitches up quickly in Soho Swkishy yarn for a perfectly plush blanket loved by both baby and parents alike! Stitch the striped design in the two purple shades shown, or switch up the colors to coordinate with your little one’s nursery. Makes a great baby shower gift!

title: Wild Berry Wrap
description: Ready your wardrobe for summer garden parties with this sweet little shawl! Stitched in a self-striping shade of Soho Playful yarn, this pretty little shawl is perfect for layering over a tank or sundress on sunny summer days. Stitch it in the strawberry colorway shown, or switch it up for a look entirely your own!

title: Willow Yarns Sunny Stitches Bag
description: Bring a bit of sunshine wherever you go with this cute crossbody bag. The intermediate crochet bag pattern stitches up quickly with ample storage space to tote your essentials when running errands or hanging out with friends. Stitch it in the sunny yellow shade Willow Yarns Farmhouse Cotton yarn shown, or choose another color to match your wardrobe.

title: Spring Cables Throw Pillow
description: Create a fresh spring look with a vibrant pop of green! This free knit pillow design stitched in Herrschners Supreme Worsted yarn is designed with rows of easy knit cables for a simple yet sophisticated way to dress up your sitting area for the season. Stitch it in the shamrock green shade shown, or switch up the look with a new color for any home or season.

title: Penelope Pig Pot Holders
description: These little piggies are ready to help in the kitchen! The pair of easy crochet pot holders is stitched in Herrschners Cottage Cotton yarn with hand-stitched accents in Herrschners Worsted yarn that turn a simple shape into an adorable pig face! The darling duo is both fun and functional as they protect hands and countertops from hot pans.

title: Granny's Planter Covers
description: Make a simple plant pot spectacular with a pop of crochet! These fun and easy planter covers created from granny squares stitch up quickly to add a hand-stitched accent to favorite plants and potted flowers. The set of two designs includes two different sizes with a classic granny square motif and a playful circular motif for a more modern look. Both designs are stitched in vintage-chic hues of Herrschners Worsted 8 Wildflowers yarn. Stitch the pair in the colors shown, or choose any other shades of Herrschners Worsted 8 yarns to coordinate the set to your décor. And don’t just limit yourself to two—make enough for your entire plant collection!

title: Village Yarn Triple Scoop Scrubbies

Stitch up the trio of easy crochet designs in the classic chocolate, vanilla, and strawberry shades shone, or mix it up with brighter colors for a more whimsical look. Just don’t forget the cherry on top!

title: Premier Boxed Beads Blanket
description: Snuggle up under textured stitches and playful pops of color! This easy crochet afghan stitched in Premier Yarns Flora yarn uses bead stitches to create rows bobbles sprinkled with specks of color for a funky twist on traditional tweed. You can crochet the blanket in the pretty pink shade shown, or pick another colorway to match your décor.

title: Village Yarn Bobbly Clean Dishcloths
description: Brighten up your spring cleaning routine with a set of bobbled dishcloths! The textured design makes scrubbing up dirty dishes a breeze, while the vintage-chic pastel shades are a trendy blend of traditional and modern. Stitch the set in the medley of spring colors shown, or mix it up to customize this pattern to match any kitchen. The set makes a great housewarming or hostess gift!

title: Tulip Bloom Baskets
description: Stitch your way to better organization with this trio of floral baskets. The intermediate crochet basket pattern is stitched in pastel shades of Herrschners Cottage Cotton yarn and embellished with a band of tiny tulips and a scalloped top for pretty and practical spring décor.

title: Sweetheart Snuggles Blanket
description: Snuggle your little one with stripes and sparkles! The self-striping yarn makes it easy to create a multicolor look without as many color changes—or ends to weave in! Stitch it in the pretty-in-pink shades shown here, or mix it up with another colorway to match the nursery.

title: Premier Popcorn Coasters
description: These groovy coasters stitch up quickly to protect your tabletops with a splash of color! The intermediate crochet designs are stitched in color-changing Preier Yarns Hipster Cotton yarn, creating randomized color patterns on each coaster for a playful look that’s one-of-a-kind!

title: Soho Darling Daisy Purse
description: Accessorize with flower power! Add a pop of pink to any outfit with this pretty little purse shaped like a flower. The easy crochet purse pattern stitches up quickly in Soho Skwishy yarn for a fun fashion accessory the perfect size to carry your essentials when running errands or on a day out with friends.

title: Clover Scrubbies
description: It's your lucky day! Dish duty just got easier with these clever clover-shaped scrubbies! The easy crochet pattern is stitched in two green shades of Herrschners Suds & Scrub yarn to brighten up your home for spring, St. Patrick’s Day, or any day you want a little luck—and a helping hand with the dishes!

It’s perfect for a housewarming gift, but don’t forget to stitch up a set for yourself! Stitch the set in the pastel shades of Village Craft Cotton Yarn shown, or mix it up to coordinate with your kitchen.

title: Kitty Cuddles Pillow

description: Snuggle up for a quick cat nap with this adorable kitty pillow! The easy crochet design features a round pillow shaped like a cat’s face, complete with whiskers, and pointy ears. title: Department 71 Tiny Cables Hat & Cowl
description: Easy enough for beginners! This easy knit hat and cowl set uses a simple repeating pattern of knit and purl stitches to gorgeous texture in these coordinating cold-weather accessories. The mock cables are stitched in Department 71 Silhouette yarn, a heathered yarn with a fuzzy texture that gives the finished projects a boutique look.

title: Premier Polychrome Grid Scarf & Beanie
description: Choose from the three suggested colorways—or mix and match your own!—to create the colorfully coordinated pair stitched in a medley of Premier Yarns Elle by Me Charlotte and multi shades. The intermediate crochet pattern makes a multicolor beanie and a coordinating scarf featuring granny squares and stripe sections for a playful way to show off your stitching skills and stay cozy on cold weather days.

title: Premier Parisian Puff Sweater
description: Make your wardrobe more fun with this textured sweater! The pattern includes sizes from Extra Small through 5X, making it easy for any stitcher to choose their favorite shade of Premier Yarns Elle by Me Odette yarn to make this sweater their own!

title: Premier Crystal Chandelier Scarf
description: This versatile lacy scarf can be worn as a scarf or a shawl for lovely layered look on a chilly day. The easy crochet design uses basic stitches to create a pretty openwork pattern for a chic finished look that’s simple enough for beginning stitchers. Choose your favorite shade of Premier Yarns Elle by Me Odette yarn to coordinate this easy crochet scarf to your wardrobe.

title: Soho Cloudia Mini Plushie
description: Meet Cloudia! Made with the irresistibly soft Soho Skwishy yarn, this cute and cuddly cloud plushie makes a snuggly sidekick for youngsters and adults alike. The easy crochet pattern works up quickly in the bulky weight chenille-style yarn for a quick-to-stich project to add a sweet smile to cloudy days.

title: Red Heart Sunray Panels Shrug

The easy knit shrug pattern is worked side to side in one piece, then seamed together to create the finished look, making it a great introduction to knitting garments. Stitch the textured pattern in the vivid pink shade of Red Heart Super Saver shown, or pick another color to make this look entirely your own.

title: Red Heart Rainbow and Clouds Blanket
description: Brighten up rainy days with a rainbow of ripples! This easy knit afghan is worked side to side, creating vertical ripples in bright and cheery shades of Red Heart Super Saver yarn. Finish off the rainbow-inspired design with boho-style fringe for a fun and trendy look for stitchers of all ages.

title: Red Heart Open to it Top
description: Pair this openwork vest with a tee or tank for layered summer looks. The easy crochet pattern is stitched in a Red Heart Super Saver yarn and includes a range of sizes from extra small to 4/5 extra large, making it easy for anyone to add this versatile vest to their wardrobe. Stitch it in the pretty purple shade shown, or pick another color to coordinate with a favorite outfit.

title: Red Heart In a Trance Blanket
description: Neutral tones are anything but boring in this striking geometric afghan. This easy crochet design uses one simple motif in two different colorways of Red Heart Super Saver Jumbo yarn, flip-flopping black and white in each round for a mesmerizing effect. Once the motif mosaic is assembled, finish it off with a purple border as shown or pick another shade for a bright and bold frame entirely your own.

title: Red Heart Hearts  & Poms Pillow
description: Love a pop of color? You’ll love this heart-shaped pillow! The easy crochet pillow design is stitched in bright shades of Red Heart Super Saver yarn and trimmed with a crocheted pom-pom edge for a fun finish. You can stitch the pillow in the colors shown, or switch up the shades to match your décor. Makes a great Valentine’s Day gift!

title: Soho Pongo Penguin
description: Pongo Penguin is ready to snuggle! This adorable polar pal is bundled up in a winter hat and scarf, ready to stay cozy as you cuddle up for a bedtime story. The easy crochet pattern is stitched in Soho Skwishy yarn, an irresistibly soft chenille-style yarn that will make Pongo a favorite for all ages.

title: Elmwood Shawl
description: Wrap yourself in a layer of warmth with this gorgeous geometric shawl. The easy crochet shawl design is worked in a series of panels that are joined together to create the trendy checkerboard pattern. It is stitched in three shades of Herrschners Worsted 8 Heathers yarn, giving the finished shawl a rustic-homespun appearance that looks as cozy as it feels.

title: Be Mine Place Mats & Coasters
description: Serve meals with an extra dash of love! Designed with a frame of pretty-in-pink hearts, this easy crochet place mat and coaster set stitched in Herrschners Cottage Cotton yarn is perfect for Valentine’s Day, anniversaries, or any day you want to fill your home with love.

title: Handy Scarf
description: This two-in-one pattern keeps you extra cozy on cold-weather days. The clever scarf is designed with a mitten on each end, giving you a place to keep your hands cozy while ensuring your mittens never get lost because they’re attached to your scarf! The intermediate knit scarf is stitched in Herrschners Worsted 8 Stripes yarn for effortless color changes as you stitch—and fewer ends to weave in! Stitch the scarf in the whimsical colorway shown, or switch it up to match your winter wardrobe.

title: Soho Fluffy Flurry Headbands
